'''HavaKing''' was a distribution chain based on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]]. It specialized in discount furniture and appliances and purchased such items as [[Grimwaldi sponge chair]]s and [[Spanthaer lava lamp]]s for resale up and down the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].

{{Company-stub}}
